svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="全链路分层架构总览" id="arch-overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-194" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="终端层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="650" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="PC端
Vue3 + Element Plus" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="56" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="移动端
Vue3 + Vant" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="266" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="小程序
Vue 跨端适配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="476" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="应用层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="650" x="40" y="158" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="业务应用
Vue3 开发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="56" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="微前端子应用
Vue3/Nuxt3 + qiankun" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="266" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="低代码应用
Vue3 可视化引擎" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="476" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#93c5fd;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="框架与中间层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="650" x="40" y="276" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="前端框架
Vue3 + Pinia + Router4" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="56" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务端渲染
Nuxt3 (SSR/SSG/ISR)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="266" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="BFF 层
Egg.js / Express" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="476" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="网关层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="650" x="40" y="394" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Nginx
负载均衡 + 反向代理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="56" y="428" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="CDN
静态资源加速" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="266" y="428" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="WAF
网络安全防护" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="476" y="428" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="后端服务层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="650" x="40" y="512" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="SpringBoot 微服务
Java" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="56" y="546" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="RESTful API
标准化输出" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="266" y="546" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="数据持久化
MySQL / Redis / MongoDB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="476" y="546" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SUP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="配套支撑体系" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="568" width="225" x="715" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SUP1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="工程化体系

ESLint + CI/CD
+ Monorepo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="199" x="728" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SUP2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="监控体系

Sentry + Prometheus
+ ELK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="199" x="728" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SUP3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="平台化体系

组件库 + 接口管理
+ 配置管理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="199" x="728" y="416" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E12" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E23" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E34" edge="1" parent="1" source="L3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E45" edge="1" parent="1" source="L4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3S" edge="1" parent="1" source="L3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="SUP" value="体系支撑"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
